changeSet.author: howners
changeSet.comment: Seed monthly payments with realistic on-time / late patterns to differentiate tenant scores.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO payments (id, rental_id, payer_id, payment_type, amount, currency, status, due_date, paid_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant1@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1750, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2025-12-05', '2025-12-03 10:00', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant1@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1750, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-01-05', '2026-01-04 09:30', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant1@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1750, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-02-05', '2026-02-02 14:15', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant1@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1750, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-03-05', '2026-03-04 08:50', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant1@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1750, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-04-05', '2026-04-03 11:00', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant1@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1750, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-05-05', '2026-05-04 16:20', NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO payments (id, rental_id, payer_id, payment_type, amount, currency, status, due_date, paid_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant2@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1380, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2025-10-01', '2025-09-29 10:00', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant2@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1380, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2025-11-01', '2025-10-31 14:00', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant2@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1380, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2025-12-01', '2025-12-08 18:00', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant2@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1380, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-01-01', '2025-12-30 09:00', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant2@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1380, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-02-01', '2026-01-30 11:30', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant2@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1380, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-03-01', '2026-03-12 16:45', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant2@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1380, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-04-01', '2026-03-30 10:00', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant2@howners.test'), 'RENT', 1380, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-05-01', '2026-04-29 13:00', NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO payments (id, rental_id, payer_id, payment_type, amount, currency, status, due_date, paid_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant3@howners.test'), 'RENT', 850, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-02-05', '2026-02-04 12:00', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant3@howners.test'), 'RENT', 850, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-03-05', '2026-03-18 08:00', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant3@howners.test'), 'RENT', 850, 'EUR', 'PAID', '2026-04-05', '2026-04-04 11:00', NOW(), NOW()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant3@howners.test'), 'RENT', 850, 'EUR', 'LATE', '2026-05-05', NULL, NOW(), NOW());

changeSet.author: howners
changeSet.comment: Past-landlord ratings to give every tenant a differentiated score signal.
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO tenant_ratings (id, tenant_id, rater_id, rental_id, payment_rating, property_respect_rating, communication_rating, overall_rating, comment, rating_period, created_at) VALUES -- Jean (current owner1 rating: excellent) (gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant1@howners.test'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='owner1@howners.test'), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', 5, 5, 5, 5.0, 'Paiements impeccables, communication fluide, bien tenu.', '6_MONTHS', NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'),
-- Sophie (current owner2 rating: bon mais quelques retards) (gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant2@howners.test'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='owner2@howners.test'), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', 4, 5, 5, 4.5, 'Très soigneuse, deux retards de paiement sur 8 mois.', '8_MONTHS', NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days'),
-- Lucas (current owner1 rating: étudiant, fragile mais correct) (gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant3@howners.test'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='owner1@howners.test'), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 3, 4, 4, 3.5, 'Étudiant, quelques retards. Reste joignable et de bonne foi.', '4_MONTHS', NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days'),
-- Inès (current owner1 rating + past owner2 rating: excellent) (gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='ines.bernard@howners.test'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='owner1@howners.test'), 'd0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000004', 5, 5, 5, 5.0, 'Locataire premium, paiements anticipés, très professionnelle.', '2_MONTHS', NOW() - INTERVAL '5 days'), (gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='ines.bernard@howners.test'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='owner2@howners.test'), NULL, 5, 5, 5, 5.0, 'Bailleur précédent — ancienne location à Singapour, recommandation forte.', 'PAST', NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'),
-- Tenants without current rentals — past landlord ratings from owner2 (Marie Martin, plays the previous landlord)
-- Antoine Dubois (famille stable) — excellent (gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='antoine.dubois@howners.test'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='owner2@howners.test'), NULL, 5, 5, 5, 5.0, 'Famille très stable, 4 ans de location précédente sans incident.', 'PAST', NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days'),
-- Camille Lefèvre (couple cadre) — excellent (gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='camille.lefevre@howners.test'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='owner2@howners.test'), NULL, 5, 5, 5, 5.0, 'Couple irréprochable sur 3 ans, état des lieux parfait à la sortie.', 'PAST', NOW() - INTERVAL '45 days'),
-- Mathieu Roussel (entrepreneur) — bon (gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='mathieu.roussel@howners.test'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='owner2@howners.test'), NULL, 4, 4, 4, 4.0, 'Entrepreneur, paiements parfois 2-3 jours après. Sérieux globalement.', 'PAST', NOW() - INTERVAL '120 days'),
-- Thomas Roux (consultant) — bon (gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='thomas.roux@howners.test'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='owner2@howners.test'), NULL, 4, 5, 4, 4.3, 'Consultant CDI, locataire fiable sur 2 ans.', 'PAST', NOW() - INTERVAL '40 days'),
-- Élodie Garnier (fonctionnaire) — bon (gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='elodie.garnier@howners.test'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='owner2@howners.test'), NULL, 5, 4, 4, 4.3, 'Fonctionnaire, ponctualité exemplaire. Logement bien tenu.', 'PAST', NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'),
-- Léa Moreau (étudiante) — moyen, peu d'historique (gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='lea.moreau@howners.test'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='owner2@howners.test'), NULL, 3, 4, 4, 3.5, 'Étudiante, premier bail. Garant solide mais profil court.', 'PAST', NOW() - INTERVAL '15 days');
